ddls:
CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who wrote the book */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publisher of the book */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the book was published */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the format of the book */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN of the book */,
  "pages" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the book */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the book */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date the author was born */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date the author died */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Science Fiction, Fantasy, Romance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_genres" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre associated with the book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the format (e.g., paperback, hardcover, e-book) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review written by the user */,
  "rated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user writing the review */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review written by the user */,
  "reviewed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the recommendation */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being recommended */,
  "recommended_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favorite_books" (
  "favorite_book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite book */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the book as a favorite */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book that is a favorite */,
  "favorited_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the book was favorited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorite_books_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorite_books_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_clubs" (
  "book_club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book club */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book associated with the club */,
  "club_name" TEXT /* Name of the book club */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the book club */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_clubs_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book that won the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "best_sellers" (
  "best_seller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each best seller */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book that is a best seller */,
  "list_name" TEXT /* Name of the best seller list */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the book was a best seller */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("best_seller_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_best_sellers_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews_per_year" (
  "reviews_per_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review count */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being reviewed */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the reviews were written */,
  "num_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews written in that year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviews_per_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_per_year_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "social_media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media account */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the social media account */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Name of the social media platform (e.g., Twitter, Facebook, Instagram) */,
  "handle" TEXT /* Handle of the social media account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_subscriptions" (
  "email_subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each email subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who subscribed to the email newsletter */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "subscribed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user subscribed to the email newsletter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("email_subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reading_challenges" (
  "reading_challenge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading challenge */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the reading challenge */,
  "challenge_name" TEXT /* Name of the reading challenge */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the reading challenge */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the reading challenge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_challenge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reading_challenges_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reading_challenge_books" (
  "reading_challenge_book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading challenge book */,
  "reading_challenge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reading challenge */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book associated with the reading challenge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_challenge_book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reading_challenge_books_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reading_challenge_books_reading_challenge_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_challenge_id") REFERENCES reading_challenges ("reading_challenge_id")
)
